name: MOVEit Transfer Vulnerability Exploit Filenames
notes: This rule detects MOVEit transfer vulnerability exploit via filename indicator of compromise.
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Operating System

when the event matches LOWER("Filename") LIKE 'human2.aspx' OR LOWER("Filename") LIKE 'human2.aspx.lnk' OR ( LOWER("File Directory") MATCHES '(c:\\windows\\temp\\[^\\]*)' AND LOWER("Filename") LIKE '%.cmdline') OR ( LOWER("File Directory") MATCHES 'c:\\windows\\microsoft.net\\framework 64\\v4.0.30319\\temporary asp.net files\\root\\[^\\]*?\\[^\\]*?' AND LOWER("Filename") LIKE 'a' ) AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY MOVEit Transfer Vulnerability Exploit Filenames on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Operating System

AND when the event matches LOWER("Filename") LIKE 'human2.aspx' OR LOWER("Filename") LIKE 'human2.aspx.lnk' OR    ( LOWER("File Directory") MATCHES '(c:\\windows\\temp\\[^\\]*)' AND LOWER("Filename") LIKE '%.cmdline') OR    ( LOWER("File Directory") MATCHES 'c:\\windows\\microsoft.net\\framework 64\\v4.0.30319\\temporary asp.net files\\root\\[^\\]*?\\[^\\]*?' AND LOWER("Filename") LIKE 'a' ) AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: MOVEit Transfer Vulnerability Exploit Filenames
Event description: Detects MOVEit transfer vulnerability exploit via filename indicator of compromise.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Machine Identifier (custom)
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
